title: Error monitoring, privacy-preserving analytics, and a consent spine
summary: The app now captures boot failures instead of showing a blank screen, the site and app gained cookieless analytics that need no cookie banner, the cloud server logs and reports errors, and one Privacy & Diagnostics control governs everything you share — off by default.
highlights: A blank-screen 'didn't load' now surfaces an actionable screen and a captured error with the failing boot stage
Cookieless analytics on the website and app — no personal data, no cookie banner
Opt-in crash reporting (Sentry-ready) gated by a single consent spine; self-hosted builds phone nothing home
Cloud server adds structured request logs + a global error handler; hubs can opt in to share scrubbed diagnostics
